headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Huntington Bancshares, Raises Price Target to $21
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $20 to $21.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Huntington Bancshares, Raises Price Target to $19.5

headline: Jefferies Downgrades Huntington Bancshares to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: Jefferies  analyst David Chiaverini   downgrades Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $21 to $19.
